commands.repair_reason: - [P2] This PR needs human secops/CODEOWNERS judgment for the new secret-backed write boundary, plus a deliberate choice between same-repo-only autoscrub and a proven fork-token flow.; Needs attention: The diff adds a secret-backed GitHub App write path in pull_request_target automation, and the fork token scope is not proven.; Review finding: [P1] Get secops approval for the App-token write path — .github/workflows... (sha=5e845f4c678a9554d27b9f09309072eeba103e15)
commands.review_summary:
This PR splits Dependency Guard into detect/autoscrub/enforce workflow jobs and adds a GitHub App GraphQL cleanup-commit path with script and test coverage for lockfile-only dependency changes.

PR surface: Tests +238, Config +70, Other +300. Total +608 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the script treats maintainer-editable forks as autoscrubbable, while the pinned token action defaults to a current-repository token when owner/repositories are unset. That combination cannot prove writes to the fork head repository.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This PR needs human secops/CODEOWNERS judgment for the new secret-backed write boundary, plus a deliberate choice between same-repo-only autoscrub and a proven fork-token flow.
